title: Mossify
description: 'Mossify' blocks with moss blocks and scrape it with an axe
body:
This mod allows you to change certain blocks to their mossy counterparts (stone bricks -> mossy stone bricks) by shift-clicking on them with moss blocks. You can also change them back to their "unmossified" state by shift-clicking them with an axe. A moss block is also dropped.

_Example:_
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MlgfMQAqYx4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
